infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Drift uses your calendar to show and manage your daily events.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Drift uses your calendar to show and manage your daily events.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Drift uses Reminders to sync tasks.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Drift uses your location to provide context-aware suggestions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Drift uses your photo library to let you attach images to tasks.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Drift uses the camera to let you capture and attach photos to tasks.
